needs_ken.question: Should scripts/crest-v1.3-judgment-benchmark.sh be re-tested on gemma4:26b before considering a model swap?
needs_ken.context: Benchmark currently uses gemma4:31b-cloud (stronger model). CHG-0963 lists gemma4:26b as approved direct-call model, but this benchmark is a quality-gate test, not a hot path. 26b has not been measured against this specific 20-atom threshold (>=90%).
needs_ken.recommendation: Run `MODEL=gemma4:26b bash scripts/crest-v1.3-judgment-benchmark.sh` ad-hoc. If 26b clears >=90% (18/20), consider swapping. Otherwise keep 31b.
